data.title: Salesforce Analysts Raise Forecasts After Q3 Earnings: 'Leading The Way In Agentic AI Cycle'
data.description: S&P 500 company Salesforce reports Q3 results with a revenue beat and AI driving transformative growth. Analysts remain bullish.

data.title: Ford's Mustang Mach-E Sales Skyrocket 38.3% In November Amid Growing EV Momentum
data.description: Ford Motor reports 14.3% sales growth in US, driven by F-Series trucks, Mustang Mach-E, and EVs. Lincoln brand also sees significant increase.

data.title: Mastercard Settles UK Antitrust Lawsuit For $250 Million
data.description: Mastercard (NYSE: MA) settles 200 million pounds lawsuit for imposing high fees on card transactions. Similar complaints against Visa (NYSE: V). MA stock down 1.19% at $519.99.

data.title: Drake's Legal Fight Involving Kendrick Lamar Takes Center Stage – And So Do Their Mega-Mansions
